cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to figure out how a typical person would answer the question about causation regarding the bookends. The question is whether Sue caused them to possess the paired set of bookends. Let me break down the scenario: 1. Sue is out of town for the weekend. 2. Sue leaves a message saying she saw a "Bartlett bookend" and wants to buy it for the left side of their bookshelf. 3. Bill visits a friend who has a right-side Bartlett bookend, which is an heirloom. 4. Bill steals the right-side bookend when his friend is in the bathroom. 5. The next day, Sue buys the left-side Bartlett bookend. 6. When Sue gets home, they have a paired set of bookends (left and right). The options are "Yes" or "No" as to whether Sue caused them to possess the paired set.
